layout_description:
Option: OPT-1
Slide description: TWO-COLUMN MARVIN TABLE LAYOUT with a full-width key takeaway bar at the bottom. The slide uses a left-to-right orientation with two equal-weight content columns occupying the body area. The left column presents 'Manufacturing KPCs' as three numbered sections with enumeration badges and body text. The right column presents 'J&J core capabilities' as a header followed by three bullet-point sections. Both columns share identical row band heights to maintain horizontal alignment across the table. A thin dashed grey separator line sits between each row section in both columns at exactly the same vertical position, creating visual rhythm and enforcing the table structure. The bottom takeaway bar spans the full slide width below the two-column content area. All content is distributed evenly across the available vertical space with no dead zones. The layout follows the Classic Marvin table pattern (Section 4, Option A) with column-centric structure, dashed separators, and no filled header bars.

Blueprint:
  Orientation: left-to-right
  Regions: 3
  Allocation: [0.45, 0.45, 0.1]

Containers:
  C0 (LEFT COLUMN — Manufacturing KPCs): Left column of the two-column Marvin table, occupying equal width with the right column (split 1:1). Column header 'Manufacturing KPCs' rendered as bold text in brand primary color, left-aligned at the top of the column, followed immediately by a thin solid horizontal line in brand dark color spanning the full column width (header underline). Below the header, three row sections of equal height (equal-peers, each with flexGrow: 1) distributed evenly across the remaining column height. Each row section contains: (1) a small filled square enumeration badge (brand primary fill, white bold number centered, proportional to body text height, left-aligned at row start, vertically centered within the row band), (2) a bold section label ('Game quality', 'Proven performance', 'Incumbent advantage') in brand text color positioned immediately to the right of the badge, vertically centered, and (3) body text in regular weight, brand text color, left-aligned with a small left inset, wrapping as needed, vertically centered within the row band. Thin dashed grey horizontal separator lines span the full column width between row sections (after row 1 and after row 2, but NOT after row 3). The column has no outer border or background fill — it sits on the white slide background. Top and bottom edges of each row section must align exactly with the corresponding row section in the right column (C1). Content volume: Row 1 has ~25 words, Row 2 has ~20 words, Row 3 has ~10 words. Font size target: medium body font, same size across all three rows to maintain within-slide uniformity (Rule C6). Reduce padding between badge and text if needed to fit content comfortably without overflow.
  C1 (RIGHT COLUMN — J&J core capabilities): Right column of the two-column Marvin table, occupying equal width with the left column (split 1:1). Column header 'J&J core capabilities' rendered as bold text in brand primary color, left-aligned at the top of the column, followed immediately by a thin solid horizontal line in brand dark color spanning the full column width (header underline). Below the header, three row sections of equal height (equal-peers, each with flexGrow: 1) distributed evenly across the remaining column height, matching the row band heights of the left column exactly. Each row section contains a bullet list with brand-color circle bullet markers, body text in regular weight, brand text color, left-aligned with a small left inset. Row 1 contains two bullets (~40 words total), Row 2 contains two bullets (~35 words total), Row 3 contains one bullet (~40 words). Thin dashed grey horizontal separator lines span the full column width between row sections (after row 1 and after row 2, but NOT after row 3), positioned at exactly the same vertical positions as the separator lines in the left column. The column has no outer border or background fill. Font size target: medium body font, same size as the left column body text to maintain within-slide uniformity (Rule C6). Text must fit comfortably within each row band without overflow — if needed, reduce padding or slightly reduce font size, but apply the same adjustment to the left column.
  C2 (FULL-WIDTH KEY TAKEAWAY BAR): Full-width horizontal bar positioned at the bottom of the slide, below the two-column content area, with a visible vertical gap separating it from the columns above. Fill: light brand accent color (tinted version of brand primary, not saturated). Height: compact — just tall enough to contain the text with a small top and bottom inset. No border. Corners: slightly rounded (soft, not sharp). Text: 'Key takeaway: Though new manufacturing entrants face hurdles to displace incumbent game providers, J&J's core capabilities, strong financial position and brand reputation position the company well to capture share in Minnesota' — rendered in brand text color (not white), regular weight, left-aligned with a small left inset, vertically centered. Font size: same as body text in the columns above. The bar spans the full usable slide width (respecting slide safe-area margins). This element provides visual closure to the slide and groups the key message as a distinct takeaway section.
  SC-BOTTOM (DECORATIVE BACKGROUND LAYER — inactive): Not active. The slide content (two columns + bottom bar) fills the available space adequately. No additional decorative background layer is needed.
  SC-TOP (OVERLAY CONNECTOR LAYER — inactive): Not active. No cross-container connectors or overlay elements are required for this slide.
